item.title: AI and Laser Tracking Drive New Era of Inspection
item.description: The ATS800 can identify and 'lock on' to a sphere target to establish its position in a coordinate system and begin measurement unattended.

item.title: Partnership to Advance Automated Inspection in Smart Manufacturing
item.description: Partners highlight operational benefits by adopting the system, including faster inspection cycles and improved measurement consistency.

item.title: Precision Gaging for New Energy Vehicle Motors
item.description: The rapid expansion of New Energy Vehicles (NEVs), including battery-electric, hybrid, and plug-in hybrid platforms, has fundamentally reshaped the metrology requirements for rotating powertrain components.

item.title: Bruker Alicona Celebrate 25 Years of Advancing Focus Variation in Industrial Metrology
item.description: Measurement systems transitioned from labs into production, increasingly becoming integrated within automated manufacturing processes.

item.title: Mitutoyo Expands in Florida with New Lakeland Metrology Service Center
item.description: Mitutoyo America Corporation expands its commercial presence in the Southeast by opening an 11,200-square-foot Metrology Service Center in Lakeland, Florida.

item.title: Visions Podcast: Fixed Scanners, Big Gains
item.description: This episode explores how Royal Canin improved safety and increased loading efficiency by 50% through Zebra Technologies' fixed-scanner system, eliminating manual barcode scans

item.title: Laying the Groundwork for Industrial AI Leadership in Europe
item.description: Industrial AI realizes its full potential when integrated into industrial processes, established architectures, and entire value chains to advance manufacturing leadership.
